splash.title: Starting OneEarning…
splash.hint: Please wait; first launch may initialize the local database.

home.title: Choose workspace
home.empty: No companies yet. Create one below or use the full web UI.

errors.unknownCompany: No workspace matches this company prefix

about.title: About OneEarning
about.body: OneEarning desktop shell using the local HTTP API; Chinese by default — change language in Settings.

escape.hint: Use full OneEarning Web for features not yet in the shell.

companySkills.unifiedSourcePlaceholder: Local path, GitHub URL, skills.sh, Clawhub slug, or clawhub install …

clawhub.errorSidecar: Clawhub sidecar is not available. Run pnpm run build:clawhub and restart the app.
clawhub.emptySourceExtra: You can paste a Clawhub slug, install command, or clawhub.ai link in the same field; it will be resolved via the local sidecar.
clawhub.browseClawhubHint: Pick a skill on the registry, then paste its slug or command into the field above.
clawhub.forceDialogBody: ClawHub flagged this skill as suspicious. Continue only if you reviewed the code and accept the risk.
clawhub.stagingRequiresDesktop: Importing the full Clawhub skill package requires the OneEarning desktop app so files can be written next to Paperclip data and imported as a local folder. Browser preview cannot stage files on disk.

knowledge.needCompany: Select a company to manage the knowledge base.
knowledge.desktopOnly: Import and “open folder” are only available in the OneEarning desktop app.
knowledge.skillsUnsupported: Skills cannot be managed in this adapter mode; knowledge reference may not work.
knowledge.sidecarUnavailable: Knowledge indexing service is offline or crashed. Files are saved locally; status appears after the sidecar runs and you rebuild the index.
knowledge.confirmDelete: Delete “{{path}}”? This removes the file on disk and its index entries.
knowledge.emptyFiles: No files yet. Open the folder or import documents.

issueDetail.productivityReviewTitle: This task is a productivity review.
issueDetail.documentKeyFormatHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _, and start with a letter or number.
issueDetail.documentErrorKeyBodyRequired: Document key and body are required
issueDetail.documentErrorKeyInvalid: Document key must start with a letter or number and use only lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _.
issueDetail.documentErrorRemoteChanged: Document changed remotely and the latest version could not be loaded
issueDetail.documentErrorUnsavedBeforeRevision: Save or cancel your local changes before viewing an older revision.
issueDetail.pausedByAncestorBefore: This issue is paused by ancestor
issueDetail.pausedByAncestorAfter: . Resume from the root issue to deliver deferred work.
issueDetail.pauseBoardRootHint: Issue execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake the assignee for triage.
issueDetail.pauseSubtreeHint: Root and descendant execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake assignees for triage.

issueRelatedWork.referencesDescription: Other tasks this issue currently points at in its title, description, comments, or documents.
issueRelatedWork.referencesEmpty: This issue does not reference any other tasks yet.
issueRelatedWork.referencedByDescription: Other tasks that currently point at this issue.
issueRelatedWork.referencedByEmpty: No other tasks reference this issue yet.

issueRunLedger.title: Run ledger
issueRunLedger.subtitleWaitingFirstRun: Waiting for the first run record.

runCard.emptyWithActivity: Runs and activity will appear here once this issue has history.
runCard.emptyNoActivity: Historical runs without liveness metadata will appear here once linked to this issue.
runCard.profileCheapFallback: Cheap profile fell back to primary

retryPending.label: Retry pending
retryPending.description: OneEarning queued an automatic retry that has not started yet.

pendingAfterFinish.label: Checks after finish
pendingAfterFinish.description: Liveness is evaluated after the run finishes.

noLivenessData.label: No liveness data
noLivenessData.description: This run has no persisted liveness classification.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: Run produced concrete evidence of progress.

plan_only.label: Plan only
plan_only.description: Run described future work without concrete action evidence.

blocked.label: Blocked
blocked.description: Run or issue declared a blocker.

needs_followup.label: Needs follow-up
needs_followup.description: Run produced useful output but did not prove concrete progress.

issueStatus.blockedReviewStalledOne: Blocked · review stalled with no clear next step
issueStatus.blockedReviewStalledMany: Blocked · {{count}} reviews stalled with no clear next step

agentDetailPage.pendingApprovalBanner: This agent is pending board approval and cannot be invoked yet.

instructions.localOnly: Instructions bundles are only available for local adapters.
instructions.modeTooltip: Managed: OneEarning stores and serves the instructions bundle. External: you provide a path on disk where the instructions live.
instructions.rootPathTooltip: The absolute directory on disk where the instructions bundle lives. In managed mode this is set by OneEarning automatically.
instructions.entryFileTooltip: The main file the agent reads first when loading instructions. Defaults to AGENTS.md.
instructions.virtualFileTooltip: Legacy inline prompt — this deprecated virtual file preserves the old promptTemplate content

skills.emptyImportFirst: Import skills into the company library first, then attach them here.

skills.unsupportedAcp: OneEarning cannot manage skills for custom ACP commands yet.
skills.unsupportedOpenclaw: OneEarning cannot manage OpenClaw skills here. Visit your OpenClaw instance to manage this agent's skills.
skills.unsupportedDefault: OneEarning cannot manage skills for this adapter yet. Manage them in the adapter directly.
skills.manageInAdapterHint: Manage skills in the adapter directly.
skills.needCompany: Select or restore company context to load skills.

runDetail.clearSessionConfirm_other: Clear session for {{count}} issues touched by this run?

configure.canCreateAgentsHint: Lets this agent create or hire agents and implicitly assign tasks.

keys.tokenBanner: API key created — copy it now, it will not be shown again.

budgetPolicyCard.pausedProject: Execution is paused for this project until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.

agentConfigForm.name: Name

agentConfigForm.capabilitiesPlaceholder: Describe what this agent can do...
agentConfigForm.promptTemplatePlaceholder: You are agent {{ agent.name }}. Your role is {{ agent.role }}...
agentConfigForm.promptTemplateWarning: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Keep it compact and dynamic to avoid recurring token cost and cache churn.
agentConfigForm.defaultEnvironmentHint: Agent-level default execution target. Project and issue settings can still override this.
agentConfigForm.bootstrapPromptPlaceholder: Optional initial setup prompt for the first run
agentConfigForm.bootstrapLegacyBanner: Bootstrap prompt is legacy and will be removed in a future release. Consider moving this content into the agent's prompt template or instructions file instead.
agentConfigForm.codexMinimalSearchWarning: Codex may reject `minimal` thinking when search is enabled.

modelPicker.noModelDetectedManual: No model detected yet. Enter a provider/model manually.
modelPicker.emptyDetectHintPrimary: No model detected. Select or enter one manually.

cheapModel.title: Cheap model
cheapModel.description: Used when a run requests the cheap profile (e.g. routine summaries). The primary model stays unchanged.
cheapModel.placeholderNoDefault: No adapter default — choose a cheaper model
cheapModel.fallbackPrefix: No explicit cheap model selected — runtime falls back to
cheapModel.noAdapterDefaultWarning: No cheap model selected and the adapter has no default. Cheap-lane runs will continue on the primary model with a fallback note.

agentConfigForm.instructionsFileHint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the prompt at runtime.
agentConfigForm.instructionsFileHintCodex: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime. Note: Codex may still auto-apply repo-scoped AGENTS.md files from the workspace.

dashboardLive.panelEmpty: No active or recent agent runs.

accountMenu.instanceSettingsDesc: Jump back to the last settings page you opened.
accountMenu.viewProfileDesc: Open your activity, task, and usage ledger.
accountMenu.editProfileDesc: Update your display name and avatar.

instanceAccessPage.error403: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
instanceAccessPage.title: Instance Access
instanceAccessPage.intro: Search users, manage instance-admin status, and control which companies they can access.
instanceAccessPage.selectUserHint: Select a user to inspect instance access.
instanceAccessPage.companyAccessIntro: Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership.

instanceHeartbeatsPage.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
instanceHeartbeatsPage.intro: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instanceHeartbeatsPage.disableAllConfirm: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
instanceHeartbeatsPage.empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

instanceExperimentalPage.lookbackInvalid: Lookback hours must be a whole number from 1 to 720.
instanceExperimentalPage.title: Experimental
instanceExperimentalPage.intro: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
instanceExperimentalPage.toggleEnvironmentsDesc: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
instanceExperimentalPage.toggleIsolatedDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
instanceExperimentalPage.toggleAutoRestartDesc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
instanceExperimentalPage.toggleAutoRestartAria: Toggle auto-restart dev server experimental setting
instanceExperimentalPage.toggleRecoveryDesc: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.
instanceExperimentalPage.recoveryDialogDesc: {{count}} recovery task(s) match the last {{hours}} hours.
instanceExperimentalPage.recoveryDialogEmpty: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery can still run for future liveness incidents in this window.

pluginManagerPage.title: Plugin Manager
pluginManagerPage.installDesc: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
pluginManagerPage.alphaBody: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.
pluginManagerPage.noExamples: No bundled example plugins were found in this checkout.
pluginManagerPage.noPluginsBody: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
pluginManagerPage.pluginErrorFallback: Plugin entered an error state without a stored error message.
pluginManagerPage.uninstallDesc: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

adapterManagerPage.title: Adapters
adapterManagerPage.alphaAlertBody: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.
adapterManagerPage.externalEmptyBody: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
adapterManagerPage.installDialogDesc: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export {{fn}}.
adapterManagerPage.localPathHint: Accepts Linux, WSL, and Windows paths. Windows paths are auto-converted.
adapterManagerPage.removeDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to remove the {{type}} adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.{{cleanup}} This action cannot be undone.
adapterManagerPage.removeDialogCleanup: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.
adapterManagerPage.reinstallDialogDesc: This will pull the latest version of {{package}} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.

activity.selectCompany: Select a company to view activity.

issueActionPhrases.issue_feedback_vote_saved: saved feedback on an AI output

issuesList.noMatch: No issues match the current filters or search.
issuesList.showingLimit: Showing up to {{limit}} matches. Refine the search to narrow further.
issuesList.boardColumnLimit: Some board columns are showing up to {{limit}} issues. Refine filters or search to reveal the rest.
issuesList.columnPickerTitle: Choose which issue columns stay visible

goalsPage.selectCompany: Select a company to view goals.

newProjectDialog.repoUrlTooltip: Link a GitHub repository so agents can clone, read, and push code for this project.
newProjectDialog.localFolderTooltip: Set an absolute path on this machine where local agents will read and write files for this project.
newProjectDialog.workspaceErrorAbsolutePath: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
newProjectDialog.workspaceErrorRepoUrl: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.

routinesPage.title: Routines
routinesPage.subtitle: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
routinesPage.emptyList: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
routinesPage.selectCompany: Select a company to view routines.
routinesPage.composerIntro: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.
routinesPage.advancedHint: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
routinesPage.footerHint: After creation, OneEarning takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.

concurrencyPolicyDescriptions.coalesce_if_active: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrencyPolicyDescriptions.always_enqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrencyPolicyDescriptions.skip_if_active: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.

catchUpPolicyDescriptions.skip_missed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catchUpPolicyDescriptions.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

signingModeDescriptions.bearer: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
signingModeDescriptions.hmac_sha256: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.
signingModeDescriptions.github_hmac: Accept GitHub-style X-Hub-Signature-256 header (HMAC over raw body, no timestamp).
signingModeDescriptions.none: No authentication — the webhook URL itself acts as a shared secret.

detail.secretSaveBanner: Save this now. OneEarning will not show the secret value again.
detail.defaultAgentBanner: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.
detail.variablesDetectedHint: Detected from `{{syntax}}` placeholders in the routine title and instructions.
detail.variablesPromptBeforeRun: Prompt the user for this value before each manual run.
detail.variablesHintBar: Use `{{syntax}}` placeholders in the instructions to prompt for inputs when the routine runs.
detail.variablesDialogDescription: How to prompt for inputs and which variables OneEarning fills in automatically.
detail.variablesCustomIntro: Type {{syntax}} anywhere in the title or instructions. OneEarning detects each placeholder, lists it under {{variablesWord}}, and prompts for a value before each run.
detail.variablesCustomBullet1: Names must start with a letter and may use letters, numbers, and underscores.
detail.variablesCustomBullet2: Pick a type (text, textarea, number, boolean, select), default value, and whether it is required.
detail.variablesCustomBullet3: The same name reused across the title and instructions is treated as one variable.
detail.variablesBuiltinIntro: These are filled in automatically — no setup needed and they will not appear in the Variables list.

date.description: Current date in YYYY-MM-DD format (UTC) at the time the routine runs.

timestamp.description: Human-readable date and time (UTC) at the time the routine runs.

detail.runDialogDescription: Choose the agent and optional project for this one run. Routine defaults are prefilled and won't be changed.
detail.runDialogDefaultAgentRequired: Default agent required for this run.
detail.runDialogChooseWorkspace: Choose an existing workspace before running.

scheduleEditor.cronHint: Five fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week

liveRunWidget.title: Live runs
liveRunWidget.subtitle: Uses the shared chat-style run surface from issue activity.

companySettingsPage.noCompany: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
companySettingsPage.noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.

companySettingsPage.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
companySettingsPage.descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
companySettingsPage.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
companySettingsPage.brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
companySettingsPage.attachmentInvalidRange: Enter a whole number from 1 to {{max}}.
companySettingsPage.requireBoardApprovalLabel: Require board approval for new hires
companySettingsPage.requireBoardApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
companySettingsPage.openClawInviteIntro: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
companySettingsPage.openClawInviteHint: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.
companySettingsPage.packagesIntroLead: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the
companySettingsPage.dangerArchiveIntro: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
companySettingsPage.archiveConfirm: Archive company "{{name}}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.

companyEnvironmentsPage.selectCompany: Select a company to manage environments.
companyEnvironmentsPage.title: Company Environments
companyEnvironmentsPage.disabledBody: Enable Environments in instance experimental settings to manage company execution targets.
companyEnvironmentsPage.intro: Define reusable execution targets for projects, issue workspaces, and remote-capable adapters.
companyEnvironmentsPage.supportMatrixNote: Environment choices use the same adapter support matrix as agent defaults. SSH is always available for remote-managed adapters, and sandbox environments appear only when a run-capable sandbox provider plugin is installed.
companyEnvironmentsPage.emptyList: No environments saved for this company yet.
companyEnvironmentsPage.fieldNameHint: Operator-facing name for this execution target.
companyEnvironmentsPage.fieldDescriptionHint: Optional note about what this machine is for.
companyEnvironmentsPage.fieldDriverHint: Local runs on this host. SSH stores a remote machine target. Sandbox stores plugin-backed provider config on the shared environment seam.
companyEnvironmentsPage.fieldHostHint: DNS name or IP address for the remote machine.
companyEnvironmentsPage.fieldRemotePathHint: Absolute path that OneEarning will verify during SSH connection tests.
companyEnvironmentsPage.fieldPrivateKeyHint: Optional PEM private key. Leave blank to rely on the server's SSH agent or default keychain.
companyEnvironmentsPage.fieldKnownHostsHint: Optional known_hosts block used when strict host key checking is enabled.
companyEnvironmentsPage.strictHostKeyCheckingHint: Keep this on unless you deliberately want probe-time host key acceptance disabled.
companyEnvironmentsPage.fieldProviderHint: Installed run-capable sandbox provider plugins appear here.
companyEnvironmentsPage.providerNoExtraConfig: This provider does not declare additional configuration fields.

projectsPage.selectCompany: Select a company to view projects.
projectsPage.workspaceSourceLocalPathDesc: A local path OneEarning can use directly.
projectsPage.workspaceSourceNonGitDesc: A local folder without git semantics.
projectsPage.workspaceSourceGitRepoDesc: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.
projectsPage.workspaceSourceRemoteManagedDesc: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.
projectsPage.workspaceRuntimeStopDone: Workspace service stopped. Issue execution is not paused.
projectsPage.workspaceRuntimeRestartDone: Workspace service restarted. Issue execution is not paused.
projectsPage.workspaceNotFound: Workspace not found for this project.
projectsPage.workspaceEditorIntro: Configure the concrete workspace OneEarning attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.

projectProperties.envHint: Applied to all runs for issues in this project. Project values override agent env on key conflicts.
projectProperties.archiveDescription: Archive this project to hide it from the sidebar and project selectors.
projectProperties.unarchiveDescription: Unarchive this project to restore it in the sidebar and project selectors.
projectProperties.codebaseTooltip: Repo identifies the source of truth. Local folder is the default place agents write code.
projectProperties.codebaseLegacyWorkspacesNote: Additional legacy workspace records exist on this project. OneEarning is using the primary workspace as the codebase view.
projectProperties.codebaseErrorLocalPathAbsolute: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
projectProperties.codebaseErrorRepoUrl: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.
projectProperties.codebaseConfirmClearLocalWithRepo: Clear local folder from this workspace?

envVarEditor.titleSealPlain: Store value as secret and replace with reference
envVarEditor.titleSealCreate: Create secret from current plain value
envVarEditor.runtimeInjectNote: OneEarning injects platform environment variables automatically at runtime.

onboardingWizard.defaultTaskTitle: Hire your first engineer and create a hiring plan

You are the CEO. You set the direction for the company.

- hire a founding engineer
- write a hiring plan
- break the roadmap into concrete tasks and start delegating work

companyInvites.inviteCreatedBodyWithCopy: Invite ready below and copied to clipboard.

profile.avatarCompanyRequired: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.

profileSettingsPage.title: Profile
profileSettingsPage.subtitle: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profileSettingsPage.uploadHintWithCompany: Stored in OneEarning file storage for {{companyName}}.
profileSettingsPage.uploadHintNoCompany: Select a company to upload an avatar into OneEarning storage.
profileSettingsPage.avatarHint: Click the avatar to upload a new image.
profileSettingsPage.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profileSettingsPage.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.

joinRequestQueuePage.selectCompany: Select a company to review join requests.
joinRequestQueuePage.error403: You do not have permission to review join requests for this company.
joinRequestQueuePage.title: Join Request Queue
joinRequestQueuePage.intro: Review human and agent join requests outside the mixed inbox feed. This queue uses the same approval mutations as the inline inbox cards.
joinRequestQueuePage.empty: No join requests match the current filters.

newAgentPage.title: New Agent
newAgentPage.subtitle: Advanced agent configuration
newAgentPage.skillsHint: Optional skills from the company library. Built-in OneEarning runtime skills are added automatically.
newAgentPage.skillsEmpty: No optional company skills installed yet.

reportsToPicker.staleManagerHint: Saved manager is missing from this company. Choose a new manager or clear.

newAgentDialog.recommendBody: We recommend letting your CEO handle agent setup — they know the org structure and can configure reporting, permissions, and adapters.
newAgentDialog.askCeo: Ask the CEO to create a new agent
newAgentDialog.chooseAdapter: Choose your adapter type for advanced setup.
newAgentDialog.ceoIssueDescription: (type in what kind of agent you want here)

companyInvitesPage.selectCompany: Select a company to manage invites.
companyInvitesPage.error403: You do not have permission to manage company invites.
companyInvitesPage.title: Company invites
companyInvitesPage.intro: Create human invite links for company access. New invite links are copied to your clipboard when they are generated.
companyInvitesPage.createIntro: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
companyInvitesPage.roleViewerDesc: Can view company work and follow along without operational permissions.
companyInvitesPage.roleOperatorDesc: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.
companyInvitesPage.roleAdminDesc: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
companyInvitesPage.roleAdminGets: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.
companyInvitesPage.roleOwnerDesc: Full company access, including membership and permission management.
companyInvitesPage.roleOwnerGets: Everything in Admin, plus managing members and permission grants.
companyInvitesPage.singleUseHint: Each invite link is single-use. The first successful use consumes the link and creates or reuses the matching join request before approval.
companyInvitesPage.historyHint: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.
companyInvitesPage.urlHint: This URL includes the current OneEarning domain returned by the server.
companyInvitesPage.historyIntro: Review invite status, role, inviter, and any linked join request.
companyInvitesPage.emptyHistory: No invites have been created for this company yet.

companyAccessPage.selectCompany: Select a company to manage access.
companyAccessPage.error403: You do not have permission to manage company members.
companyAccessPage.title: Company access
companyAccessPage.intro: Manage company user memberships, membership status, and explicit permission grants for {{name}}.
companyAccessPage.instanceAdminBanner: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.
companyAccessPage.humansIntro: Manage human company memberships, status, and grants here.
companyAccessPage.pendingJoinsIntro: Review human join requests before they become active company members.
companyAccessPage.noMemberships: No user memberships found for this company yet.
companyAccessPage.editMemberDesc: Update company role, membership status, and explicit grants for {{name}}.
companyAccessPage.grantsIntro: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides and extra access that should persist even if the role changes.
companyAccessPage.implicitNoRole: No role is selected, so this member has no implicit grants right now.
companyAccessPage.implicitIncludedWithNamedRole: Included implicitly by the {{role}} role. Add an explicit grant only if it should stay after the role changes.
companyAccessPage.implicitIncludedWithSelectedRole: Included implicitly by the selected role. Add an explicit grant only if it should stay after the role changes.
companyAccessPage.removeMemberDesc: Archive {{name}} and move active assignments before hiding this user from assignment fields.

instanceGeneralPage.title: General
instanceGeneralPage.subtitle: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
instanceGeneralPage.deploymentLocalTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
instanceGeneralPage.deploymentPublic: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
instanceGeneralPage.deploymentPrivate: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
instanceGeneralPage.censorBody: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
instanceGeneralPage.keyboardBody: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
instanceGeneralPage.backupBody: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
instanceGeneralPage.feedbackBody: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to OneEarning Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
instanceGeneralPage.feedbackPromptBanner: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
instanceGeneralPage.feedbackDenyDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
instanceGeneralPage.feedbackDevHint: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
instanceGeneralPage.signOutBody: Sign out of this OneEarning instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

helpSubtree.pause: Pause active execution in this issue subtree until an explicit resume.
helpSubtree.resume: Release the active subtree pause hold so held work can continue.
helpSubtree.cancel: Cancel non-terminal issues in this subtree and stop queued/running work where possible.
helpSubtree.restore: Restore issues cancelled by this subtree operation so work can resume.

helpLeaf.pause: Pause active execution on this issue until an explicit resume.
helpLeaf.resume: Release the active pause hold so this issue can continue.

treeControl.previewForbidden: Only board users can preview subtree controls.
treeControl.previewStale: Preview is stale because subtree hold state changed. Retry to refresh.
treeControl.previewInvalid: This subtree action is currently invalid for the selected issues.
